teaching_goals: the second period close is as peaceful as the first
the Ab tonic is a regular resting point

teaching_notes.note: Second period resolution — same peace as the first, slightly deepened.
technique: continue arm weight through the note

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 21–24 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile) (continuation of mm. 17–20), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 21–24 and describe how the second period closes.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 21–24.
Measures 21–24 complete the second period — the melody settles with a peaceful resolution. Let me loop mm. 21–24.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 21–24: second period consequent, peaceful resolution. Pairs with mm. 17–20.
